zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Néville於大約1180年出生在英國林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比時，他的父親Ralph de Neville28歲，母親Alice de Rafin28歲。他和Alice Albini至少有1個兒子。他去世於1230年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Néville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Néville was born about 1180, in South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Ralph de Neville, was 28 and his mother, Alice de Rafin, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Alice Albini. He died after 1230, in South Petherton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Néville est né environ 1180, à South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Neville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice de Rafin, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Alice Albini. Il est décédé après 1230, à South Petherton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Névilleが約1180年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス イングレビーで生まれた時，父Ralph de Nevilleは28歳，母Alice de Rafinは28歳であった。彼はAlice Albiniとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1230年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトソウス ペスエルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Néville(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 링코실르 소우스 잉글레비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Neville(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Rafin(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Alice Albini(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 소우스 페더턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Néville родился около 1180 г. в местности соут инглеби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Neville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Rafin, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alice Albini. Он умер после 1230 г. в местности соут петиртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
